name: create_deployment
description: Create a new deployment on Vercel from a Git source. Specify the project name, Git repository, branch or commit, and optional build settings. The deployment will build and deploy asynchronously. Use list_deployments to check the status.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the project to deploy.

parameters.name: gitSource
parameters.description: Git source configuration with 'type' (github/gitlab/bitbucket), 'org', 'repo', and 'ref' (branch name or commit SHA).

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Deployment target: 'production' or 'preview'. Defaults to 'preview' for non-default branches.

parameters.name: projectSettings
parameters.description: Override project settings for this deployment: 'buildCommand', 'installCommand', 'outputDirectory', 'framework'.
